testcase.name: test_create_order_razorpay_not_configured

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 200 or 500, got 520 assert 520 in [200, 500] + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_checkout_apis.py:291: in test_create_order_razorpay_not_configured assert response.status_code in [200, 500], f"Expected 200 or 500, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 200 or 500, got 520 E assert 520 in [200, 500] E + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code
